ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Detailed sector classification */,
  "sub_sector" TEXT /* Sub-sector classification */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being evaluated */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Open price of the stock on the evaluation date */,
  "target_price" REAL /* Target price suggested by the evaluation */,
  "upside_downside" TEXT /* Upside or downside percentage from open to target price */,
  "price_call" TEXT /* Recommendation type (e.g., buy, hold, sell) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the recommendation */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the evaluation date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the evaluation date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the evaluation date */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analyst who made the evaluation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments from the analyst */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Measure of the analyst's confidence in the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user profile of the analyst */,
  "firm_name" TEXT /* Name of the firm the analyst is associated with */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience in the financial industry */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Analyst's area of specialization */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Relevant certifications the analyst holds */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_history" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation being tracked */,
  "actual_price" REAL /* Actual price of the stock at the date measured */,
  "date_measured" TEXT /* Date on which the performance was measured */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the evaluation was successful (true/false) */,
  "high_price_measured" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the date measured */,
  "low_price_measured" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the date measured */,
  "volume_measured" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the date measured */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_history_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user managing the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the portfolio is denominated */,
  "goal_amount" REAL /* Target amount the portfolio aims to achieve */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Risk tolerance level of the portfolio */,
  "investment_strategy" TEXT /* Brief description of the investment strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio stock record */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock in the portfolio */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares held in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price of the stock per share */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  "last_sale_price" REAL /* Last sale price of the stock */,
  "last_sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the last sale */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the stock in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES investment_portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user creating the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the watchlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the watchlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the watchlist was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_stocks" (
  "watchlist_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist stock record */,
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being monitored */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the stock in the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_stocks_watchlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("watchlist_id") REFERENCES watchlists ("watchlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock associated with the news */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL link to the full news article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock associated with the indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator (e.g., RSI, MACD) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator */,
  "date_measured" TEXT /* Date on which the indicator was measured */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of indicator (e.g., Momentum, Volatility) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
